S.text: First-time soft contact lens wearer; glasses since age ~12.

O.text: Spectacle Rx OD: -3.50 -0.75 x 170 (initial '-3.75' misspoken then self-corrected to -3.50).
Spectacle Rx OS: -4.25 sphere, no significant cylinder.
Trial soft lens: base curve 8.6 mm, diameter 14.2 mm OU.
Fit OD: good centration, full corneal coverage, ~0.3 mm movement on blink.
Fit OS: well centered, good coverage, movement slightly greater but within range.
Over-refraction OD: -0.50 improves VA from 20/30 to 20/20; OS 20/20 with no over-refraction needed.

A.text: Successful first soft contact lens fit OU; over-refraction refined OD power.

P.text: Prescribe soft CL: OD -4.00, OS -4.25; base curve 8.6 mm, diameter 14.2 mm OU (OD power reflects -0.50 over-refraction, i.e., -3.50 -> -4.00).
Wear 6-8 hours/day first week, build up; no sleeping in lenses.
One-week follow-up to check fit/eye health and confirm Rx.
